sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n58268" key="kogxogenh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κογχο-γενής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n58268.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">born from a shell</tr_>, of Aphrodite, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.173</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
